title: Homesteadder's Stay
description: A sweet, Homestead and Adventure focused modpack.
body:
## A home to remember.
Homesteadder's Stay is a home-building themed modpack. Go on great adventures, and return yourself to a peaceful home where you can collect yourself without worrying about the terrors of the night.

Make wine, food, find new crops, breed new animals, get new pets, fight new monsters, and explore the world! The world is your oyster, there are no quests to gate or guide you-- just pick a direction and run.

This modpack does it's best to not touch the base Minecraft systems for building a home, though there a few changes to the systems for Adventuring to keep things interesting.

Although this modpack does have 200+ mods, it's intended to be lightweight. About half of the mods are either dependencies, QoL changes, or simply just graphical fixes and adjustments to make your game run better-- any mod addition suggestions are welcome!

### Server supported!
I'd heavily recommend using the [mrpack-install](https://github.com/nothub/mrpack-install) application to deploy your servers automatically. 
It's as simple as putting the server mrpack in the same location as the application, and using the command `mrpack-install [mrpack name]`.

Server mrpacks are included with each upload. If the server version offered is lower than the client that it came with, then it's compatible with clients up to the one it's paired with.
